Frequently asked questions

Can I change plans at any time?

Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

Is there a free trial?

We offer a 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required to get started.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

Do you offer refunds?

We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not completely satisfied.

Can I cancel anytime?

Absolutely. Cancel anytime from your account settings with no cancellation fees.

name: FAQ
description: Searchable FAQ with categories and accordion items
defaultPrompt: A FAQ page organized into categories: General, Pricing, Support, and Account. Each category has 4 common questions with detailed answers.
aiInstructions: Replace questions and answers with realistic FAQs specific to this business. Keep the category structure and accordion layout.
html:
Frequently asked questions

Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.

General

What do you do?

We help businesses of all sizes grow through expert consulting, design, and technology solutions. Our team handles everything from strategy to execution.

How long have you been in business?

We've been helping businesses like yours for over 8 years. In that time we've worked with more than 500 clients across a wide range of industries.

Do you work with small businesses?

Absolutely. Many of our clients are small and medium-sized businesses. We offer plans and services designed to fit different budgets and needs.

Where are you based?

Our main office is in New York, but we work with clients nationwide and internationally. Most of our work is done remotely.

Pricing

How much does it cost?

Our pricing depends on the scope of your project. We offer both fixed-price packages and hourly consulting. Contact us for a custom quote.

Do you offer payment plans?

Yes, we offer flexible payment plans for larger projects. We can typically split payments into three milestones: start, midpoint, and delivery.

Is there a free consultation?

Yes! We offer a free 30-minute discovery call to understand your needs and see if we're a good fit before any commitment.

What's your refund policy?

We stand behind our work. If you're not satisfied, we'll make it right. We offer a full refund within 14 days for any packaged service.

Support

How do I get help?

You can reach us by email, phone, or through our client portal. We aim to respond to all inquiries within one business day.

What are your support hours?

Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9am to 6pm Eastern Time. Emergency support is available 24/7 for Pro and Enterprise clients.

Do you offer training?

Yes, we provide onboarding training for all new clients and offer additional training sessions upon request.

Can I request a feature or change?

Of course. We welcome feedback and work with our clients to continuously improve. Submit requests through your client portal or email us directly.

Still have questions?

Our team is happy to help.

Contact us
